Class epp.Tree

   +----epp.Tree
public class Tree
extends Object
implements Cloneable, Serializable

Tree $B$N%5%V%/%i%9$K!"(B Identifier $B$H(B LiteralTree $B$,$"$j$^$9!#(B $B$9$Y$F$NCj>]9=J8LZ$N%N!<%I$O!"(B Tree, Identifier, LiteralTree $B$N#3$D$N$$$:$l$+$G(B $BI=8=$5$l$^$9!#(B plug-in $B$O!"9=J8$r3HD%$7$F?7$?$Jl9g$G$b%N!<%I$r#3$D$N%/%i%9$N$$$:$l$+$GI=8=$7$J$1$l$P$J$j$^$;$s!#(B

$B%/%i%9(B Tree $B$N%$%s%9%?%s%9(B tree $B$KBP$7$F(B tree.print() $B$H$$$&(B $B%a%=%C%I8F$S=P$7$r$9$k$3$H$G!"Cj>]9=J8LZ$r#S<0$N7A$G(B $B=PNO$9$k$3$H$,$G$-$^$9!#(B $BNc$($P!"(B 

	if (x == 0) System.out.println("Hello!");
$B$H$$$&%W%m%0%i%`$r9=J82r@O$7$?7k2L$NCj>]9=J8LZ$O!"(B 
      (if
       (==
        (id x)
        (literalTree int "0"))
       (expressionStatement
        (invokeLong
         (name
          (id System)
          (id out))
         (id println)
         (argumentList
          (literalTree string "Hello!"))))
       (emptyStatement))
$B$H(B print $B$5$l$^$9!#(B

LiteralTree $B$H(B Identifier $B$K4X$7$F$O!"(B tree.args() $B$O(B $B>o$KD9$5#0$NG[Ns$rJV$7$^$9!#(B $B$3$N$h$&$J;E3]$1$K$J$C$F$$$k$?$a!"(B tree $B$KBP$9$k:F5"E*=hM}$O(B $BHs>o$K4JC1$K$J$j$^$9!#Nc$($P!"(B tree $B$NCf$K(B if $BJ8$,8=$l$k?t$r?t$($k(B $B%a%=%C%I$O!"(B 

int countIf(Tree tree){
  int c = 0;
  if (tree.tag() == :if) c++;
  Tree[] args = tree.args();
  for (int i = 0; i < args.length; i++){
    c += countIf(args[i]);
  }
  return c;
}
$B$G$9$`$3$H$K$J$j$^$9!#(B

$B%/%i%9(B Tree $B$O!"(B tag $B$H(B args $B$NB>$K$b9THV9f>pJs$J$I$NIU2C>pJs$r(B $B;}$C$F$$$^$9!#(B $B$3$l$i$N>pJs$rJ]B8$7$?$^$^!"(B args $B$NCM$@$1$rJQ99$7$?(B tree $B$r(B $B@8@.$7$?$$;~$K$O!"(B "modifyArgs" $B$H$$$&%a%=%C%I$r;H$$$^$9!#(B 

	Tree[] newArgs = {...};
	Tree newTree = tree.modifyArgs(newArgs);
$B$3$l$O!"pJs$,(B newTree $B$K$b%3%T!<$5$l$kE@$,0[$J$j$^$9!#(B 
	Tree[] newArgs = {...};
	Tree newTree = new Tree(tree.tag(), newArgs);

quoteString 
 public static String quoteString(String in)
This method is called by class Identifier and LiteralToken. 
   Examples:
  	"foo" -> "(J\(B"foo(J\(B""
  	"(J\(Bn" -> "(J\(B"(J\\(Bn(J\(B""
  	"(J\(B"" => "(J\(B"(J\\\(B"(J\(B""
